scripts.format: prettier --write index.html src vite.config.ts tsconfig.json capacitor.config.ts README.md
scripts.format-check: prettier --check index.html src vite.config.ts tsconfig.json capacitor.config.ts README.md
scripts.dev:ios: pnpm sync && (vite --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173 & vite_pid=$!; trap 'kill $vite_pid 2>/dev/null || true' EXIT INT TERM; cap run ios --no-sync --live-reload --host localhost --port 5173)
scripts.dev:ios:remote: pnpm sync:remote && (vite --mode remote --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173 & vite_pid=$!; trap 'kill $vite_pid 2>/dev/null || true' EXIT INT TERM; cap run ios --no-sync --live-reload --host localhost --port 5173)
scripts.dev:android: pnpm sync && (vite --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173 & vite_pid=$!; trap 'kill $vite_pid 2>/dev/null || true' EXIT INT TERM; cap run android --no-sync --live-reload --host localhost --port 5173 --forwardPorts 5173:5173)
